name: Truliant Federal Credit Union Charlotte
description_short: Truliant Federal Credit Union's Charlotte University branch offers full-service banking with checking, savings, and member services at a single location in Charlotte, NC.
description_long:
Truliant Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Charlotte area through multiple branch locations, including the University branch located at 1915 Back Creek Drive. As a credit union, Truliant operates on a not-for-profit basis, returning earnings to members through competitive rates and lower fees compared to traditional banks. The organization provides comprehensive banking services including checking and savings accounts, loans, and financial products typical of full-service credit unions serving individuals and families in North Carolina.

The Charlotte University branch offers extended hours and multiple service channels to accommodate member needs. The branch features both lobby and drive-thru services Monday through Friday, with Saturday hours available for weekend banking. Members can access their accounts through ATMs, night depositories, and drive-up options, providing flexibility for those with varied schedules. Phone support is available at 800-822-0382 for member inquiries and account services.

As a credit union rather than a commercial bank, Truliant distinguishes itself through member ownership and mission-driven financial services. The organization serves multiple communities across North Carolina with four additional branches in the Charlotte metropolitan area, including Harrisburg, South End Charlotte, Mint Hill, and Huntersville. This network provides members with convenient access and local decision-making typical of community-based credit unions.

The University branch provides standard banking conveniences but represents a single location within a larger credit union system. Members should review specific product offerings, rates, and fees on the main Truliant website, as the branch page focuses on location services rather than comprehensive product information. For consumers seeking personalized service and member-owned banking, Truliant offers a traditional credit union alternative to commercial banks.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended Friday hours until 6:00 pm and Saturday hours until noon for working members
Multiple service channels including drive-thru, drive-up ATM, and night depository for convenience
Member-owned credit union structure typically offering competitive rates and lower fees than banks
Four additional branches in Charlotte metro area (South End, Mint Hill, Huntersville, Harrisburg) for network access
Direct phone support at 800-822-0382 for account inquiries and member services
Change machine available for member convenience
Appointment scheduling available for member consultations
cons: Single location information provided does not detail specific product offerings, rates, or APYs
Limited hours compared to some 24/7 banking options (closes at 5pm weekdays, noon Saturday)
Website branch page lacks comprehensive information about loan products, credit cards, or investment services
No mention of online banking features, mobile app, or digital service capabilities on this branch page
Membership eligibility requirements not specified on branch page
best_for: Charlotte-area residents seeking member-owned credit union banking with personal service
Working professionals needing extended weekday hours (until 6pm Friday) and Saturday access
Members preferring local branch relationships over large national banks
diagnosis: Truliant Federal Credit Union's Charlotte University branch is best for North Carolina residents seeking traditional credit union banking with member ownership benefits and convenient local access. The main caveat is that this branch location page provides limited information about specific products, rates, and full service offerings—consumers should visit the main Truliant website or contact the branch directly to compare rates and terms against other banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
